title: Blazing Embers
description: Blazing Embers" adds three unique coals: Bituminous (12 items), Lignite (1 item), and rare Anthracite (100 items). Transform your crafting, cooking, and mob intimidation with fiery finesse!
body:
🔥 Blazing Embers: Unleash the Coal-nival of Chaos! 🔥

Attention, brave block-breakers and combustible crafters! Tired of spelunking through the same old caves? Welcome to "Blazing Embers," where your Minecraft world is about to become hotter than a magma block at noon!

🌋 Discover the Trio of Toastiness:
Descend into the depths and unearth the fiery triumvirate of coals! Bituminous, the socialite of the cave, throws a burning party for 12 items at a time. Lignite, the humble marshmallow, gently toasts a single item with rustic charm. But hold onto your pickaxe because Anthracite is the real rockstar, found only in the fiery realms of the Nether, where it burns through a hundred items like a blaze on a caffeine binge!

💎 Forge in the Flames:
Think twice before tossing just any old coal into your furnace. Bituminous and Lignite, the life of the underground bash, are dancing in the caves below the surface. But Anthracite, the elusive gem, hides in the fiery heart of the Nether, waiting for only the bravest miners to discover its scorching potential. It's rarer than a charged creeper at sunrise!

🔥 Fuel Your Minecraft Mayhem:
Why settle for ordinary coal when you can add a touch of pyrotechnic pizzazz to your Minecraft mayhem? "Blazing Embers" isn't just a mod; it's the spark that turns your crafting escapades into a blazing spectacle. Whether you're cooking up a feast, smelting legendary gear, or just scaring off mobs with style, these coals are the game-changer you never knew you needed. Grab your gear, ignite the fun, and let the coal-nival begin!

🔥 Ready for a Coal-tastic Adventure:
Strap on your enchanted boots, grab your fire-resistant gear, and prepare for a coal-nucopia of fun. "Blazing Embers" – where every ember tells a tale, and Anthracite is the rare gem waiting to turn your Minecraft adventure into a blazing inferno!
